title: While we pray and while we plead
firstLine: While we pray and while we plead,
publicDomainBasis: Daniel Webster Whittle (1840–1901), Charles Clinton Case (1843–1918). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
While we pray and while we plead,
While you see your soul’s deep need,
While our Father calls you home,
Will you not to Jesus come?

sections.label: Chorus
Chorus
sections.text:
In the world you’ve failed to find
Aught of peace for troubled mind;
Come to Christ, on Him believe,
Peace and joy you shall receive.

sections.label: Chorus
